projectDescription: A public archive of NTSB Freedom of Information Act materials related to the China Eastern Airlines Flight MU5735 accident investigation, including official FOIA documents, flight recorder data, and an unofficial Chinese translation of the NTSB recorder report.
keyFeatures: NTSB FOIA documents related to China Eastern Airlines Flight MU5735 (March 21, 2022)
Cockpit Voice Recorder (CVR) and Flight Data Recorder (FDR) recovery report
Raw FDR data with 150+ validated parameters from the final 12 minutes of flight
Unofficial Chinese translation of the NTSB recorder report (CC BY 4.0)
FOIA response letters and supplementary materials
Publicly archived materials originally shared under a deleted GitHub repository
publicApiSurface: ExactSample.csv — FDR data at exact sample timestamps with 150+ parameters
TableResolution.csv — FDR data at 1/16-second resolution with validated parameters
MU5735_NTSB_Recorder_Report_Chinese.md — Unofficial Chinese translation of NTSB recorder report
report.pdf / report (2-6).pdf — NTSB FOIA response reports
